metadata.name: ww-form-container
metadata.description: A form container component that manages form inputs, validation, and submission handling. It serves as a wrapper for form elements and manages their state and interactions.
features: Form validation on submit or on input change
Form reset with optional initial values
Tracks individual field values and validity states
Does not support file upload inputs

properties.name: validation
properties.description: Controls when form validation occurs. 'submit' validates only on form submission, 'change' validates on every input change with a debounce delay.

properties.name: debounceDelay
properties.description: Delay in milliseconds before validation triggers when validation is set to 'change'. Only applicable when validation is 'change'. Range: 1-5000ms.

properties.name: autocomplete
properties.description: Enables or disables browser autocomplete functionality on the form.

events.name: submit
events.description: Triggered when the form is submitted. Requires a submit button inside the form to work.

events.name: submit-validation-error
events.description: Triggered when form validation fails on submission.

localContext.description: The form object containing all form state and data.

formData.description: An object containing all current form field values. Keys are the field names and values are the current input values.

fields.description: A record containing all form input names with their values and validation states. Each key is a field name, and the value is an object with 'isValid' (boolean) and 'value' (any) properties.

actions.label: Set form state
actions.description: Manually set the form's submitting and submitted states. Useful for controlling form state during async operations.

actions.label: Reset form
actions.description: Reset all form fields. Optionally provide initial values to reset fields to specific values instead of empty.

slots.name: formContent
slots.description: The content of the form container. Place form input elements and a submit button inside this slot.

variables.name: form
variables.description: Object containing the full form state including fields (with their values and validity), isSubmitting, isSubmitted, and isValid flags. Accessed via variables['formId-form'].

specifications: A submit button must be placed inside the form for the 'on submit' event to trigger.
Do not disable the submit button when the form is invalid. The form handles validation errors on its own.
For inputs that need custom validation, set 'customValidation': true in the input's props.
The 'isValid' local context checks all inputs including hidden ones, so avoid relying on it for multi-step or dynamic forms.
The debounceDelay property is only relevant when validation is set to 'change'.
